presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — Build the Business Engine
presentation.subtitle: Turning your vision into a measurable business.

slides.title: Build the Business Engine
slides.body: Every successful entrepreneur knows their numbers.
slides.speakerNotes: Numbers Workshop — Vision, Systems, People, Process, Growth.

slides.title: What Does Success Actually Look Like in Numbers?
slides.body: Measurable goals, systems, scalable growth, sustainable impact.
slides.speakerNotes: Open discussion: what would success look like in numbers for your venture?

slides.title: The Dream Isn't Enough
slides.body: Dream lifestyle → Income goal → Monthly revenue → Weekly activity → Daily habits.
slides.speakerNotes: Every step connects. Align. Plan. Execute. Repeat.

slides.title: Dream Income Worksheet
slides.body: Annual → monthly → weekly → daily income targets, plus daily action targets.
slides.speakerNotes: Workshop: break the dream into daily action.

slides.title: The SPIKE Business Engine — 10-5-3-1-3
slides.body: Prospects → Discovery meetings → Solution presentations → Closed case → Referrals.
slides.speakerNotes: One repeatable system. Predictable business results. Referrals fuel the next 10 prospects.

slides.title: The Leadership Engine
slides.body: You run one Revenue Engine → Build a team of advisors → Multiply your results.
slides.speakerNotes: Income is no longer limited by your time — it's multiplied through leadership.

slides.title: The Growth Engine — Three Engines, One Enterprise
slides.body: Revenue Engine + Leadership Engine + Enterprise Engine — build, multiply, scale together.
slides.speakerNotes: You are always producing, developing people, and improving the business.

slides.title: Master → Multiply → Scale
slides.body: Stage 1: Master the Revenue Engine. Stage 2: Multiply through people. Stage 3: Scale with systems.
slides.speakerNotes: Most entrepreneurs begin Stage 2 while mastering Stage 1, and Stage 3 while growing Stage 2.

slides.title: Workshop — Build Your Business Engine
slides.body: Reverse engineer from annual income goal to prospects and referrals.
slides.speakerNotes: Manage the activities. The results will follow. Fill in your numbers.

slides.title: Design the Numbers Behind Your Enterprise
slides.body: Revenue Engine + Leadership Engine + Growth Engine — connect the numbers.
slides.speakerNotes: Revenue creates momentum. Leadership creates leverage. Growth creates impact.
